name: health-mate
description: Health-Mate is an executable bilingual Chinese/English OpenClaw health-management skill with local markdown parsing, clearer weekly chart labeling, locale-aware PDF generation, and automatic English fallback when bundled local Chinese font file 'assets/NotoSansSC-VF.ttf' is missing. SECURITY DISCLOSURE: 1. It requires 'MEMORY_DIR' to be explicitly set and exits if that variable is missing. 2. The bundled shell runners read 'config/.env' when present, then write local reports/logs during normal execution. 3. Outbound network requests only occur when webhook/Tavily credentials are configured, or when the user explicitly enables runtime font download via 'ALLOW_RUNTIME_FONT_DOWNLOAD'.
author: tankeito

env.MEMORY_DIR: Required. Explicitly set this to the markdown health-memory directory that the skill should read. The skill now exits if MEMORY_DIR is missing.
env.TAVILY_API_KEY: Optional. Used for Tavily-assisted local fallback in expert commentary, next-day planning, and weekly review suggestions.
env.DINGTALK_WEBHOOK: Optional. If set, the final report payload can be sent to DingTalk.
env.FEISHU_WEBHOOK: Optional. If set, the final report payload can be sent to Feishu.
env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Optional. If set together with TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, the final report payload can be sent to Telegram.
env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: Optional. Required only when Telegram delivery is enabled.
env.REPORT_WEB_DIR: Optional. Local directory where generated PDFs can be copied for public serving.
env.REPORT_BASE_URL: Optional. Public base URL used to build downloadable PDF links.
env.ALLOW_RUNTIME_FONT_DOWNLOAD: Optional. Disabled by default. Set to true only if you explicitly allow fallback download of NotoSansSC-VF.ttf when no bundled/system CJK font is available.

commands.description: Generate the localized daily Health-Mate report.
Generate the localized weekly Health-Mate review.

features: Executable local Python scripts and shell runners, not an instruction-only prompt bundle
Bilingual Chinese/English parsing, prompts, and report generation
Strict memory-write protocol for reliable markdown parsing
Localized daily and weekly PDF reports with charts, multi-condition support, and automatic English fallback when the bundled local Chinese font is unavailable
Custom scoring modules and additional monitoring sections including medication and lab-style sections
Optional outbound network behavior limited to Tavily, webhook delivery, and explicit opt-in fallback font download
